name: PACIFIC RIM CAFE

violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean venthood.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Clean ceiling vents. -Clean floors under kitchen equipment.
Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insect electrocution or trapping device was installed in an inappropriate location. -Fly strip hanging above prep table.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean top of dishwasher and dishwasher trays. -Clean fronts of coolers and handles.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Employee observed washing hands in a warewash sink. -Need to use handwash sink only.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Was not emitting sanitizer.
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)

source_address: 1375 N LACROSSE ST STE 1, Rapid City
